name: Chevron Area Kids' Rug - Pillowfort™
description: Elevate the look of your child's indoor space with the Chevron Area Rug from Pillowfort™. This rectangular accent rug is adorned with a white chevron pattern set on a solid-hued, contrasting background for a look that's easy to match with any decor style and color palette. Crafted from a soft and lightweight material, this tufted rug features a high-pile construction to add a luxurious layer of comfort underfoot, and it boasts a latex backing to help keep the rug in place on the floor. Whether they lie on it to enjoy a storybook, play board games or watch TV, the decorative rug makes a fun and functional addition to your kiddo’s bedroom or playroom.
